tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Install SAELens, TransformerLens, and verify GPU access. Verify pre-trained SAE loading for GPT-2 Small.

tasks.name: E1: UAD with Random Baseline
tasks.description: Run UAD on GPT-2 Small layer 8 and compute random baseline F1. Randomly select N pairs (where N = same-cluster pairs found by UAD) 100 times. Report UAD F1 vs random baseline F1, delta, and permutation test p-value. Target: UAD F1 - Random F1 >= 0.3.

visualizations.description: UAD F1 vs Random Baseline F1

tasks.name: E2: UAD Ablation Studies
tasks.description: Test 5 UAD ablations: (A1) no clustering - pure co-occurrence thresholding, (A2) no phi coefficient - raw co-occurrence counts, (A3) no dead feature filter - include all features, (A4) single-link clustering, (A5) K-means clustering. Compare F1, precision, recall per variant. Target: Full UAD F1 >= 0.6, each ablation shows measurable degradation.

visualizations.description: UAD ablation results: F1 per variant

tasks.name: E3: UAD Cross-Layer Validation
tasks.description: Run UAD on GPT-2 Small layers 4, 8, 10 individually. Report F1 per layer separately (no averaging). Analyze feature activity and supervised label counts per layer. Target: layer 8 F1 >= 0.6, layer 10 F1 >= 0.5. Layer 4 may be lower - report honestly.

tasks.name: E4: False Positive Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze false positive pairs from UAD on layer 8. Classify each FP into categories: topical co-occurrence, shared super-absorber, random. Report phi coefficients and marginal frequencies. Suggest post-hoc filters. Target: identify dominant FP pattern and propose filter.

tasks.name: E5: Statistical Significance Testing
tasks.description: Add statistical rigor to UAD F1 claim. Bootstrap CI: resample examples with replacement 1000 times, compute F1 distribution. Permutation test: shuffle cluster assignments, compute null F1 distribution. Report 95% CI and p-value. Target: 95% CI lower bound >= 0.5, p < 0.05.

visualizations.description: Bootstrap F1 distribution with 95% CI marked

tasks.name: E6: DFDA with Parent-Positive Evaluation
tasks.description: Rebuild DFDA evaluation using parent-positive protocol. For each absorbed pair, collect examples where parent SHOULD activate (based on ground truth). Train MLP to predict parent from child. Evaluate on parent-positive examples. Baselines: no-compensation, random residual, mean-prediction. Target: parent-positive MSE improvement > 20%. If < 5%, drop DFDA from paper.

visualizations.description: DFDA parent-positive recovery per pair with baselines

tasks.name: E7: UAD with Alternative Correlation Metrics
tasks.description: Test UAD with alternative correlation metrics: Pearson correlation, mutual information (discretized), Jaccard similarity, pointwise mutual information (PMI). Compare F1, precision, recall across metrics. Target: phi coefficient achieves highest or near-highest F1.

tasks.name: Baseline: Random Pair Selection
tasks.description: Compute F1 of random feature pair selection as null model for UAD. Run 100 random selections, report mean F1, precision, recall. This is the core baseline for E1.

tasks.name: Baseline: Random Residual Injection
tasks.description: Inject random residuals (instead of MLP-predicted) into parent features. Measure parent-positive MSE change as control for DFDA.

tasks.name: Main Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate all UAD results (E1-E5, E7), random baseline, and ablations. Generate main result tables and figures. Compute effect sizes and summarize contributions.

tasks.name: DFDA Results Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate DFDA parent-positive results (E6) and baselines. Determine whether DFDA meets threshold for inclusion in paper. Generate DFDA figures.
